---
title: "“Authorship” in Ladies at Work: Papers on Paid Employments for Ladies by Experts in the Several Branches ed. Lady Jeune"
---

## “Authorship” in Ladies at Work: Papers on Paid Employments for Ladies by Experts in the Several Branches ed. Lady Jeune

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Non-fiction: advice to aspirant writers
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: A.D. Innes & Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
